headline: Nifty, Sensex pare a ~500-pt rally as TCS, Infosys, Tech Mahindra lead IT-sector profit-booking
gist: Nifty/Bank Nifty give back a big chunk of the day's gains as IT majors (TCS, Infosys, Tech Mahindra) lead profit-booking; Nifty +0.15% at 24,087, Bank Nifty +0.42% at 57,705, both faded from session highs.

headline: WTI slips off $80.93 intraday high to $79.87 as Hormuz blockade standoff holds without fresh escalation
gist: WTI crude eased off the day's $80.93 high to $79.87 (+0.67%) as the US-Iran Hormuz blockade standoff continues without a new escalation; Brent above $85.

headline: Gold retreats to $4,032 (-0.9%) off $4,068 high as oil-driven inflation angle trims Fed rate-cut bets
gist: Gold fell 0.9% to $4,032, pulling back from a $4,068 intraday high, as the crude rally stoked inflation concerns and reduced Fed rate-cut expectations; silver -0.84% to $58.61 tracking the move.

headline: FIIs net sell Rs740cr, DIIs net buy Rs2,928cr on Jul 14 — steady domestic support cushions index downside
gist: FIIs were net sellers of Rs740cr while DIIs net bought Rs2,928cr in the July 14 session, domestic flows cushioning index downside amid FII selling.

headline: EIA reports 61 Bcf storage build, keeping nat gas range-bound near $2.90 despite East Coast heatwave demand
gist: US natural gas held range-bound near $2.90 after EIA reported a 61 Bcf storage build for the week, offsetting an East Coast heatwave that had lifted power-burn demand.
